User.title: User
User.description: Registered competitive candidate preparing for BCS and banking exam survival runs.

examTarget.description: List of targeted exams e.g. BCS, Bank AD

totalGames.description: Total survival game matching sequences registered

bestStreak.description: Highest correct answer sequence record achieved

totalScore.description: Accumulated overall experience points of the player

fastestResponse.description: Single fastest correct response time in seconds

lastActiveAt.description: ISO string format of last game completion or update

Question.title: Question
Question.description: An individual syllabus question from Bangladesh Public Service guidelines or banking criteria.

id.description: Unique database ID of the question

subject.description: Subject category e.g. Bangla, English, Mathematics

difficulty.description: Complexity slider rating e.g., 1 to 4 scaling difficulty

options.description: List of four possible distractor options

answer.description: Exactly matching literal string of correct response

source.description: Standard historical reference e.g. 43rd BCS preliminary

Match.title: Match
Match.description: High-tension survival game session telemetry record.

mode.description: Survival mode variant e.g. Survival, Speed, PVP

duration.description: Total elapsed seconds during the matching cycle

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.description: Aggregated cognitive metrics, weakness tracks, and training directions.

subjectStats.description: Chronological performance data per syllabus topic

/users/{userId}.description: Candidate demographic profiles and persistent state metrics.

/matches/{matchId}.description: Historic matches and competitive play outcomes.
